.github/workflows/camel-test-drives.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 17 for the build environment.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the deprecated and removed mockito-all artifact with the modern mockito-core artifact.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.why_exists: The mockito-all artifact is deprecated and may not be available or compatible with newer build environments; mockito-core is the standard artifact.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.general_idea: Add mockito-junit-jupiter dependency to support JUnit 5 integration with Mockito.
Remove the legacy JUnit 4 dependency as the project migrates to JUnit 5.
Upgrade maven-war-plugin to a newer version compatible with the target environment.
Replace separate source and target configuration with the unified release configuration in maven-compiler-plugin.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.why_exists: The release flag is the recommended way to configure Java version in modern Maven/Java setups, replacing separate source/target.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.general_idea: Replace deprecated Mockito any() matcher with nullable() for null-safe matching.
jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.why_exists: The any() matcher is deprecated in newer Mockito versions; using it may cause compilation warnings or errors depending on strictness settings, and nullable() is the recommended replacement for null arguments.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/src/test/java/com/je.general_idea: Add Mockito strictness configuration to control stubbing behavior.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade Spring Framework version to 6.x to support Java 21 and Jakarta EE.
Upgrade Spring Security version to 6.x to align with Spring Framework 6.
Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
Upgrade Guava to a version compatible with Java 21.
Upgrade Lombok to a version compatible with Java 21.
Upgrade JaCoCo Maven Plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
Upgrade JAXB API to Jakarta EE version for Java 21 compatibility.
Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with release flag.
Migrate JAXB dependency from javax.xml.bind to jakarta.xml.bind namespace.
